topStrip.text: UAE + International ERP, software and digital transformation partner

hero.title: Implement Odoo ERP and automate your business growth.
hero.copy: AimAze Tech Solutions helps UAE and international companies move from spreadsheets, manual approvals and disconnected tools to a clean ERP, CRM, finance, reporting and customer-management system built around real business workflows.
hero.imageAlt: Odoo ERP solutions by AimAze Tech Solutions
hero.cardText: Sales, finance, CRM, HR, inventory, dashboards and integrations

about.title: A business-first technology partner, not only a software vendor.
paragraphs: We combine practical finance, operations and ERP understanding with technology delivery, so every implementation is aligned with control, reporting, accountability and management visibility.

Our approach is built for growing companies that need reliable systems, not complicated software. We map your process, configure the right modules, customize only where it adds value, train your teams and support continuous improvement.

problems.title: If operations depend on Excel, WhatsApp and manual follow-ups, growth becomes expensive.
problems.copy: AimAze helps companies replace disconnected work with one connected operating system for sales, finance, operations and management reporting.

items.title: No real-time visibility
items.text: Management cannot see live sales, receivables, payables, margin, tasks or team performance.

items.title: Manual reporting
items.text: Finance and operations teams spend hours preparing reports instead of controlling the business.

items.title: Disconnected departments
items.text: Sales, accounts, HR and operations use separate files and information becomes unreliable.

items.title: Weak approval control
items.text: Approvals, handovers and customer updates are not properly tracked inside one system.

platform.title: A practical Odoo setup shaped around your business workflow.
platform.copy: We help you select the right Odoo modules, configure the workflow, customize approval and reporting logic, integrate existing systems and train your users so ERP becomes a daily management tool.
bullets: CRM, sales, invoicing, accounting, inventory, HR and project workflows
Custom dashboards for CFO, CEO, sales and operations visibility
Approval flows, document attachment controls and audit-ready processes
Integrations with websites, forms, chat tools, payment links and third-party systems
Training, go-live support, issue tracking and continuous improvement

process.title: A structured ERP implementation path that reduces risk.

items.title: Discovery
items.text: Review business goals, current process, pain points, users and reports.

faq.title: Questions business owners ask before starting.

items.question: Do you only provide Odoo ERP?
items.answer: Odoo ERP is our main focus, but we also provide CRM, software development, dashboards, integrations, IT management and professional websites.

items.question: Can you support businesses outside UAE?
items.answer: Yes. We support UAE and international clients through remote discovery, implementation, training and support.

items.question: Can you customize Odoo for our workflow?
items.answer: Yes. We first map your process and then customize workflows, approvals, reports, dashboards and integrations where required.

items.question: Can we add WhatsApp inquiry later?
items.answer: Yes. The website includes a WhatsApp-ready button. Replace YOUR_WHATSAPP_NUMBER in content.json with your number in international format.

items.question: Do you provide support after go-live?
items.answer: Yes. Go-live support, user training, issue tracking and continuous improvements are part of the recommended implementation approach.
